title: Swing Volume Profile Pro [WillyAlgoTrader]
thesis_bullets: TradingView indicator: Swing Volume Profile Pro [WillyAlgoTrader] by WillyAlgoTrader.

📊 Swing Volume Profile Pro is an overlay indicator that builds a true volume distribution profile for each completed swing leg — distributing each candle's volume across price bins proportionally to how much of the candle's range overlaps each bin (TPO-like allocation), then calculating the Point of Control (highest-volume price), Value Area (70% of volume around POC), buy/sell delta per b
The result is a volume profile that maps exactly to the swing structure, not to … Source URL: https://www.tradingview.com/script/7yozLqCv-Swing-Volume-Profile-Pro-WillyAlgoTrader/.

strategy_heuristics_used: Every hypothesis should include explicit regime assumptions and invalidate conditions.
Separate signal logic from execution logic to reduce confounded performance attribution.
Require risk gating concepts before scaling complexity in entry or exit rules.
automation_heuristics_used: Keep human approval checkpoints for high-impact automation and deployment transitions.
Enforce deterministic session gating before any live-capable execution pathway is enabled.
Invest first in telemetry for risk, latency, and execution drift before adding new automation features.
